nodes.label: User Banner 273 - GTA VI Promotional Poster
nodes.description: Grand Theft Auto VI promotional poster used as a user profile banner. Portrait orientation. Features the GTA logo at top, two characters (male and female) leaning against a classic car in the foreground, palm trees in the background, and a vibrant Miami/Vice City sunset sky with purple-to-orange gradient. Style is the official Rockstar Games GTA VI art direction with warm tropical aesthetic.
